name: unused-variable
description: Used when a variable is defined but not used.

name: ZeroDivisionError
description: Logical division by zero detected in static analysis.

name: AttributeError
description: Object has no attribute with the specified name.

name: dangerous-default-value
description: Using a mutable default value (like [] or {}) is risky due to late binding.

name: unreachable
description: The code after a return, raise, break, or continue will never be reached.

name: duplicate-key
description: A dictionary has more than one entry with the same key.

name: exec-used
description: Use of the exec function is generally considered dangerous.

name: eval-used
description: Use of the eval function is dangerous and should be avoided.
